hero.badge: The Modern Indian Blood Donation Platform
hero.title: Find verified blood donors faster when the window is tight.
hero.subtitle: Donorix combines urgency scoring, karma-backed trust, privacy-safe donor matching, and multilingual support for recipients across India.
hero.feedSubtitle: Emergency posts are ranked first, followed by urgency, freshness, and community trust.
hero.featureOneBody: Consent-aware profiles, 90-day donation cooldown, and public reputation signals.
hero.featureTwoBody: Critical requests rise to the top and unlock direct contact when medically urgent.
hero.featureThreeBody: English and Hindi today, with architecture ready for 28+ Indian languages.

feed.emptySubtitle: The next verified request will appear here in real time.
feed.noMatches: No blood requests match the current search or filter.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Match alerts, donor approvals, expiry reminders, and admin notices.
notifications.sectionSubtitle: Match alerts, approvals, reminders, and policy updates.
notifications.empty: No notifications yet. Blood matches, approvals, and reminders will appear here.

leaderboard.title: Karma leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Ranked by verified donations, responsive participation, and zero no-shows.
leaderboard.empty: Leaderboard unlocks once verified donations begin flowing through the platform.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage notifications, language, privacy, theme, and account controls from one place.
settings.themeDescription: Choose the color mode that fits your environment best.
settings.notificationSmsBody: Receive urgent donor and request alerts via SMS when that integration is enabled.
settings.notificationPushBody: Get in-app notifications for approvals, matches, and request status changes.
settings.notificationEmailBody: Receive account and safety updates by email.
settings.languageHint: Hindi and English update the full UI today. More languages coming soon.
settings.radiusBody: Control how far Donorix should look for matches before automatic expansion.
settings.privacyDiscoverableBody: Allow your public profile to appear in donor matching and public rankings.
settings.privacyDirectContactBody: Reveal your direct contact details only when an emergency approval is granted.
settings.privacyLeaderboardBody: Opt out of the public donor leaderboard while keeping emergency matching enabled.

assistant.title: Donorix Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Session-aware help panel
assistant.placeholder: Ask about donation, requests, or policy
assistant.intro: Ask me about donor eligibility, creating a request, or how Donorix works. I will keep this conversation for the current session.
assistant.fallback: I can help you create a blood request, explain donor eligibility, or guide you to the live feed.

sidebar.subtitle: Urgent care starts with faster matching.
sidebar.emergencyBody: Requests marked emergency receive priority scoring, contact unlock, and expanded notification reach.
